name: Arvo Cafe
tagline: Aussie-inspired at SALT Kakaako — the ube bread alone is worth the trip.
parking: SALT has street parking and a lot behind the complex
talkStory: Arvo means 'afternoon' in Australian slang. Jess built this into one of the most Instagrammed cafes in Hawaii — the pink/coral interior is designed for it. Go right at 8am opening on weekdays. The pastry case sells out early. Walk around SALT afterward — great murals, boutiques, and Moku Kitchen is in the same complex.
